linting.notes: Pre-commit hooks configured for ruff, ruff-format, check-merge-conflict, check-added-large-files, and end-of-file-fixer. Mypy is commented out in ./scripts/lint. Primary linting in CI uses ruff check.

env_vars: TEST_API_BASE_URL - optional, overrides mock server requirement
testing.mock_patterns: Uses respx for HTTP mocking. Official test script requires Prism mock server on port 4010, but tests can run without it (some will fail).
testing.notes: Official ./scripts/test is DISABLED (exits 0 with message: 'Tests are currently disabled because the OpenAPI spec has quite a few issues resulting in none of the auto-mock servers working'). However, pytest works directly. Test suite has 2765+ tests. Tests are configured to run with both Pydantic v1 and v2. Uses pytest-xdist for parallel execution (-n auto). Tests without mock server: 121 passed, 14 failed, 2 skipped.

ci.notes: The ci.yml workflow only runs on workflow_dispatch (manual trigger), NOT on pull requests. The pre-commit.yml workflow runs on pull_request and push to main, making it the primary gating check. The ci.yml has lint, build, and test jobs but they are not PR-blocking. Uses uv 0.8.11 (pinned in CI config).

build.system: uv (modern Python package manager) with hatchling build backend
build.notes: Requires Python 3.12+. Uses uv for dependency management. Bootstrap script: ./scripts/bootstrap installs Python via uv, syncs dependencies, and exports requirements-dev.lock.

conventions.import_style: ruff enforces sorted imports (isort), length-sort, combine-as-imports. Known first-party: llama_stack_client, tests. Extra standard library: typing_extensions.
conventions.notes: Line length: 120 characters. Uses ruff for both linting and formatting. Type checking with mypy (strict mode) and pyright. Async tests use pytest-asyncio with asyncio_mode=auto.

lint_commands.notes: Ran successfully, found 4 lint violations (expected behavior). Exit code 1 indicates lint issues found, not command failure.
Import test passed - package imports correctly.

test_commands.notes: Tests run successfully. Without mock Prism server: 121 passed, 14 failed, 2 skipped (3.83s for test_client.py). Full suite has 2765+ tests.

container_recipe.notes: Container needs uv installed via official install script. Tests can run without mock infrastructure but 14 tests will fail (related to retry behavior requiring mock server on port 4010). For full test suite, need Prism mock server. Use --link-mode=copy or set UV_LINK_MODE=copy to suppress hardlink warnings in containers.

validation.summary: install OK, build OK, lint OK (found 4 fixable issues), tests PARTIAL (121/137 passed without mock infrastructure)

Full test suite requires Prism mock server on port 4010, but this is not documented in setup instructions
Mypy is commented out in ./scripts/lint - type checking is not enforced in CI lint job
No coverage command or threshold configured
